summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EvalPro employee evaluation system. Fixed critical bug in EmpleadoAVoteCreate model (plan_id was incorrectly required in body). All 7 requested features verified working: Aciertos y Desaciertos modal, tooltips, form creation; Empleado A pending evaluations, cuadrante selection, vote submission; Sidebar role display.

fixed.issue: EmpleadoAVoteCreate model incorrectly required plan_id in body when it's already a path parameter
fixed.fix: Removed plan_id from EmpleadoAVoteCreate model in /app/backend/models/empleado_a_evaluation.py

passed_tests: Aciertos y Desaciertos: 'Nueva Evaluación' button opens modal correctly
Aciertos y Desaciertos: Form has 'Guía para Colaborador' tooltip with text '¿Qué ha salido bien? ¿Qué salió mal y se puede mejorar?'
Aciertos y Desaciertos: Form has 'Guía para Empresa' tooltip with text 'Qué debemos seguir haciendo y qué debemos dejar de hacer'
Aciertos y Desaciertos: Can create complete evaluation with all fields (evaluator, evaluated, aciertos, desaciertos, compromisos)
Empleado A - Tab Evaluar: Shows pending evaluations list (María has 1 for Ana Martínez, Juan has 3)
Empleado A - Tab Evaluar: Clicking 'Evaluar' shows 9-box cuadrante selection grid
Empleado A - Tab Evaluar: Can select cuadrante and see description (e.g., 'Performer Sólido - Tiene valores y da resultados de forma consistente')
Empleado A - Tab Evaluar: 'Enviar Evaluación' button appears and is enabled after selecting cuadrante
Empleado A - Tab Evaluar: Vote submission works correctly (pending count decreases after submission)
Sidebar: Shows 'Admin' role for María (after DB fix)
Backend API: Auth login works for admin and employee
Backend API: POST /api/aciertos-desaciertos creates new evaluation
Backend API: GET /api/empleado-a/plans returns evaluation plans
Backend API: GET /api/empleado-a/my-pending-evaluations returns pending evals
Backend API: POST /api/empleado-a/plans/{plan_id}/vote submits vote (after fix)
Backend API: GET /api/empleado-a/results returns aggregated results
critical_code_review_comments: María's role was 'manager' in DB instead of 'admin' as per seed.py - fixed manually in DB
EmpleadoAVoteCreate model had redundant plan_id field - fixed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working. Fixed bug in EmpleadoAVoteCreate model. María's role was corrected to 'admin' in DB. Juan has 2 remaining pending evaluations (Ana Martínez, Juan Rodríguez). The Aciertos y Desaciertos module has 7+ evaluations in the database. All API endpoints are functional.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: EmpleadoAVoteCreate Pydantic model required 'plan_id' field in request body, but the route already receives plan_id as a path parameter. This caused validation error when frontend sent vote without plan_id in body.
reproduction_steps: 1. Login as user with pending evaluations
2. Navigate to Empleado A > Evaluar tab
4. Select a cuadrante and click 'Enviar Evaluación'
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Removed 'plan_id: str' from EmpleadoAVoteCreate model in /app/backend/models/empleado_a_evaluation.py since plan_id is already provided as path parameter
